headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://challenges.cloudflare.com https://static.cloudflareinsights.com https://*.cloudflare.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; img-src 'self' data: https: blob:; font-src 'self' data: https://fonts.gstatic.com https://fonts.googleapis.com; connect-src 'self' https: wss: ws: https://challenges.cloudflare.com https://static.cloudflareinsights.com https://*.cloudflare.com; frame-src 'self' https://challenges.cloudflare.com https://*.cloudflare.com; child-src 'self' https://challenges.cloudflare.com https://*.cloudflare.com; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'
